name: Marlin
desc: Marlin is a firmware for RepRap 3D printers optimized for both 8 and 32 bit microcontrollers. Marlin supports all common platforms. Many commercial 3D printers…
descFull: Marlin is a firmware for RepRap 3D printers optimized for both 8 and 32 bit microcontrollers.  Marlin supports all common platforms.   Many commercial 3D printers come with Marlin installed.  Check with your vendor if you need source code for your specific machine.
